Verified from setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which list and process this directory.

Code analysis of verifier.py reveals contradictions: position tolerance is checked as < 0.2 (not 0.15), distance tolerance is < 1.0 (not 0.5), and speed is verified via string containment rather than a strict 0.1 numerical difference.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires parsing navigational data from Bridge Command scenarios located in /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios and outputting a deck log and voyage statistics to /home/ga/Documents/. The dataset primarily consists of official simulation scenarios sourced from the open-source Bridge Command repository, supplemented by one synthetic scenario (z_Test_Waypoint_Nav) injected via setup_task.sh. Analysis of verifier.py reveals contradictions in the claimed tolerances: the actual position minutes tolerance is < 0.2 (not 0.15), the distance tolerance is < 1.0 nm (not 0.5 nm), and the speed tolerance relies on string formatting matches rather than a strict 0.1 numerical threshold.
